turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi diane , how is diane ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: diane is doing okay , how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is doin' okay . so the doctor knows the nurse told diane about dax and the doctor would like to tell dax a little bit about diane okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: diane is a 28 year old female with a past medical history , significant for , depression and hypertension who presents for emergency room follow-up . so diane what's going on ? the doctor heard that diane's blood pressure was really high in the emergency room . what happened ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , so diane ended up going for a walk , um , yesterday 'cause yesterday was sunny and yesterday was really great . and diane just felt really light-headed , um , and diane started to fall a bit , and , um , luckily diane was with diane's boyfriend and diane's boyfriend caught diane , um , and then diane and diane's boyfriend went right to the e , to the er .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , okay . yeah , the doctor saw that diane's blood pressure was pretty high , like in , like , the , almost 200 .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: did diane have a headache ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah diane did .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . have diane's blood pressures been running high in the past ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , diane's blood pressures have been . diane's blood pressure is- diane's blood pressure is , like , once a week , a month , diane's blood pressure , kind of , just skyrockets .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , diane's blood pressure usually ends up , um , being , diane is traveling a lot that week for work , so diane is not eating as well , um-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: diane is not taking diane's blood pressures , the doctor takes the doctor take it-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . when diane is traveling ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , no , diane do n't bring diane's blood pressure cuff with diane .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , but diane did buy the blood pressure cuff like the doctor and diane talked about in the past ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes diane did .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . and is diane taking diane's medication , is diane taking the lisinopril ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes diane is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . um , so the doctor thinks the doctor had started diane at a , kind of , a moderate dose , so the doctor and diane will have to talk about the moderate dose a little bit , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: then in terms of diane's depression , how is diane doing ? the doctor knows that the doctor did n't start diane on medication , since diane is on a bunch of other medications . what- what are diane's strategies for dealing with diane's depression and how is diane doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so last year diane started therapy and diane've been going once a week and therapy has really helped .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right , great . and how is diane's support system ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: really great . diane's boyfriend , diane's mom , and diane's brother are- are s- , amazing and diane's boyfriend , diane's mom , and diane's brother are all super close to diane , so diane's support system has been , diane's support system has been good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , well great . so the doctor knows diane did a review of system sheet when diane checked in and the doctor knows that diane had the headache and the lightheadedness yesterday . does diane have any other symptoms at this time , chest pain , shortness of breath , anything like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , diane have a little bit of nasal congestion , but the nasal congestion is just from diane's seasonal allergies .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . well the doctor want to go ahead and do a quick physical exam , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the blood pressure . so , yeah , looking at diane's blood pressure today here in the office , diane's blood pressure does look a little elevated still , so the doctor and diane will have to talk about diane's blood pressure . so the doctor is just gon na listen to diane's heart and diane's lungs and the doctor and diane will go from there okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so on physical examination , the doctor- the doctor do n't appreciate any carotid bruits in diane's neck . diane's heart on diane's heart exam , diane's heart exam does show that diane have a slight two out of six systolic ejection murmur . diane's , there , diane's lung exam shows nice clear lungs bilaterally and diane do have some trace pitting edema to diane's lower extremities bilaterally . so what the physical examination findings means is , the doctor know , the doctor- the doctor think ultimately , uh , the doctor know the doctor just need to get diane's blood pressure under better control , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , uh , let the doctor just go ahead , the doctor want to take a look at some of diane's results , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the ecg . yeah , so in reviewing the results of diane's ekg , diane's ekg looks the same as last year . um , diane do have just blood , those changes from diane's chronic high blood pressure that the doctor will address , okay ? hey , dragon , show the doctor the echocardiogram . and the echocardiogram is just the echocardiogram from just a few months ago that just , the doctor know , show that diane have that slightly leaky heart valve , nothing to do for the slightly leaky heart valve , and that diane's heart murmur is stable , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so let's just talk a little bit about , the doctor know , the doctor's assessment and the doctor's plan for diane . so , for diane's first problem , diane's high blood pressure , diane's high blood pressure is not controlled at this time , so the doctor want to go ahead and increase the lisinopril to 40 milligrams once a day . the doctor want diane to continue to check diane's blood pressures and report diane's blood pressures to the doctor through the patient portal and the doctor and diane will have to make adjustments if necessary and maybe have to add a second agent , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and then for diane's second problem , uh , the doctor want , the doctor know , for diane's depression , the doctor do n't think that the doctor need to start diane on any medication , diane's depression treatment sounds like diane're doing really well from that standpoint , but the doctor know that diane can contact the doctor if diane , if diane need anything , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does diane have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , not at this time .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right , well it's good to see diane .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good seeing the doctor too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , finalize the note .
